title: podman from within both tmux and Visual Studio Code Terminal causes Error: short-name resolution enforced but cannot prompt without a TTY
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Fedora Workstation 36

2. From within either [TMUX](https://github.com/tmux/tmux) in [Kitty](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/) or the [Visual Studio Code Terminal](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/terminal/basics)

3. `podman image pull nginx/nginx`

**Describe the results you received:**

    $  podman image pull nginx/nginx
    Error: short-name resolution enforced but cannot prompt without a TTY

**Describe the results you expected:**

    $  podman image pull nginx/nginx
    ? Please select an image: 

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

It works from a **GNOME Terminal**, so you (or a library you rely on for this) must be using some heuristics which are getting something related to TTY detection wrong. FYI I have not had this issue with any other utility. Here are some of my environment variables which may be interesting in this context, let me know if you need know the value of any others:

    COLORTERM truecolor
    TERM screen-256color
    TERMINFO /usr/lib64/kitty/terminfo
    TERM_PROGRAM tmux
    TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION 3.3a

**Output of `podman version`:**

```

Version:      4.3.1

```

comments.body: Thanks for opening the issue, @vorburger!  I will take a look at this.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

> @vrothberg any progress?

Thanks for the ping.  No progress yet but I added it to my todo list.

I cannot reproduce in any of the environments.  Especially when being used in tmux or vscode, I'd expect much more bugs/issues/complaints.

@vorburger, are you still seeing the issue?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
